label: Phase 3 recommendation

fieldResults.truthValue: The video successfully builds and maintains high excitement through rapid action sequences, but suffers from pacing issues during static title cards and extended pre-order screens. To improve retention, condense the early title card and integrate the pre-order information more dynamically to prevent viewer drop-off before the final post-credits scene.
fieldResults.outputValue: The video successfully builds and maintains high excitement through rapid action sequences, but suffers from pacing issues during static title cards and extended pre-order screens. To improve retention, condense the early title card and integrate the pre-order information more dynamically to prevent viewer drop-off before the final post-credits scene.

fieldResults.truthValue: Patience hits its lowest point (0.3) at 10 seconds (Chunk 3) due to an extended, static title card. Conversely, excitement peaks at 55 seconds (1.0) during rapid transitions between red-lit corridors and desert environments. The pre-order screens at 120-130 seconds (Chunks 25 and 26) cause a massive spike in boredom (0.8) and a drop in excitement (0.2). The post-credits action scene at 130 seconds is highly effective but risks being unseen if viewers drop off during the static promo screens.
